transcript: Customer: This is an emergency, my light fixture has no power and it's getting bad! This is Angela Reed at 9 Lakeview Drive. Dispatcher: Okay Angela, stay calm. I'm getting a technician dispatched to 9 Lakeview Drive right now. Customer: Please hurry. Dispatcher: A tech is on the way, they'll call you when they're close.

expected_entities.issue: emergency: light fixture has no power
